_meta.keyKnowledge: We share our media art with others.

_source.w: We share our media art with others.
y: Sharing our work helps us learn to present ideas clearly.
Others can enjoy and learn from what we create.
Talking about our art helps us think about what we made.
eg: We show our media art to our teacher and say what it is about.
We take photos at a class event and put them in order to tell the story.
We add sounds to our photos using instruments and our voices.
We draw a series of pictures to illustrate a story and record ourselves telling it.
We share our class picture book and answer questions about it.
We display our photos on a screen and talk about what is happening in each one.
